DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-26-2001 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEMURRER - O/C ADVANCED TO 11/19.

Demurrer
Off Calendar Nov-19-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Jonathan Seigel, Esq. 928-7300 for pltf & opposing party; Evelyn Funes, 255-8399 deft & moving party in pro per.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer overruled, complaint adequately alleges compliance with rent ordinance.
The Court adopted its tentative ruling. 5 days to answer. Order signed in open court.
